emails.subject: Re: Book notes
emails.body: Re: Book notes Amy, I received your voice-mail message. I was traveling last week and unable to answer it directly. I shall be glad to join you on Thursday for the presentation (3 p.m. on my calendar). Vince

emails.subject: Re: Book notes
emails.body: Vince: look forward to meeting you Amy Vince J Kaminski@ECT 07/24/2000 08:33 AM
